chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3641 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مُشْتَرِي اَلْعَقَارِ مَرْزُوقٌ وَ بَائِعُ اَلْعَقَارِ مَمْحُوقٌ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3641 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The buyer of real estate is blessed, while the seller of real estate is deprived."
